ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class of equipment */,
  "test_ac_volts" INTEGER /* Testing voltage in AC for the equipment class */,
  "use_ac_volts" INTEGER /* Usage voltage in AC for the equipment class */,
  "test_dc_volts" INTEGER /* Testing voltage in DC for the equipment class */,
  "use_dc_volts" INTEGER /* Usage voltage in DC for the equipment class */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color of the label associated with the equipment class */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., motor, generator, transformer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the equipment class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the testing protocol */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment class to which the protocol applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing protocol */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of testing (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure for the testing protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_protocols_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES equipment_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment class tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester who conducted the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES equipment_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testers" (
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tester */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the tester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tester */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the tester (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the tester belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labeling_standards" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the labeling standard */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment class for the standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the labeling standard */,
  "label_format" TEXT /* Format of the label (e.g., color, size, font) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labeling_standards_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES equipment_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment class that was checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compliance check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES equipment_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the inspector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
